description: An ICE arrest card. The background is a high-contrast black-and-white close-up photograph of a person's open hand being cuffed, with metal handcuffs and a chain visible, against a dark backdrop. Large light-blue (cyan) bold serif capital text at top reads 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL,' with a white sub-line beneath giving the date and location: '1/27/2025 | Newark, NJ'. On the left side, large bold white sans-serif text names the subject: 'Edgar Julca Tangoa'. Below that a white 'CRIMES:' label with a bulleted list: 'Aggravated sexual assault' and 'Child molestation'. The DHS/ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark appear at the lower left. A diagonal red banner ribbon across the lower-right corner reads 'NEWARK'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/27/2025 | Newark, NJ; Edgar Julca Tangoa; CRIMES: Aggravated sexual assault, Child molestation; NEWARK
